---
title: "Results"
---

| Study | Status | Main diagnostic |
|---|---|---|
| [Method 2 GPU fix](formal-cutevents-method2-gpu-fix/index.qmd) | Preliminary | 20-start optimizer, memory growth and fit projections |
| [Formal cutevents baseline](formal-cutevents-example/index.qmd) | Preliminary | Multi-start fit and projection quality |
